survivors_flagged.one_line: Corp America Airports signed a Brasilia concession Transition Amendment with ANAC (Jun 26); ongoing renegotiation + surging IV is a dated structural/regulatory milestone worth watching.
Capricor Deramiocel (DMD): FDA AdCom Jul 29 2026 + PDUFA Aug 22 2026, with positive HOPE-3/5yr OLE data; stock sold off 13% into the AdCom-scheduling news, a real dated binary with asymmetry.
Biglari's 8th proxy fight live (8.7% stake, board nominee filed Jan 2026); dated annual-meeting vote + post-rebrand turnaround = real structural trigger, but a serial-loser activist caps asymmetry.
Live definitive merger-arb: Knox Lane all-cash $13.25/sh, close expected Q3 2026; but at $13.21 the spread is ~0.3% — fully priced, thin asymmetry.

Hard PDUFA July 17, 2026 for gedatolisib (HR+/HER2- wild-type) + Q3 launch; VIKTORIA-1 PFS win already out, but approval binary into a large market with broader VIKTORIA-2 optionality remains forward and asymmetric.
Definitive de-SPAC with tokenization firm Securitize (→SECZ); shareholder vote dated ~June 29, 2026 — real dated deal but imminent/about to close, trust-value-floor SPAC, asymmetry largely set.
Catalyst-rich '26 (CLN-978 SLE/RA at EULAR Jun, zipalertinib PDUFA Feb-27); real dated readouts but key approval is far + asymmetry not clearly mispriced.
Cretostimogene NMIBC: rolling BLA completing Q4'26 + PIVOT-006 topline H1'26; real dated binaries, Fast Track/Breakthrough.
Complicated $34.5B Cox merger; DOJ/FCC cleared, only California CPUC left vs hard Sep-15-2026 HSR deadline — dated regulatory binary but CHTR is the acquirer/parent.

Definitive $597M Northfield merger + MHC second-step conversion, regulatory approvals received and stock offering commenced, targeted close early Q3 2026 — a real dated structural event (own the underlying through conversion).

Barzolvolimab Phase 3 CSU topline due Q4 2026 (enrollment complete, 1,939 pts) plus PN readout in summer 2026 — dated binaries supporting a 2027 BLA; mispriced asymmetry if you frame it as event-driven.

verified.catalyst: CAAP's 51%-owned Inframerica signed a Transition Amendment Agreement with Brazil's ANAC to renegotiate the Brasilia airport concession (fixed→variable fees, Infraero exit, +10 regional airports), triggering a fast-track public tender for 100% of Inframerica's shares.
verified.dated_milestone: Fast-track competitive public tender for 100% of Inframerica shares expected by December 2026; if no bids, amended concession reverts automatically to Inframerica (TAA signed Jun 26, 2026).
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named: ANAC, Ministry of Ports & Airports, Federal Court of Accounts, Infraero exit) + G2 (concrete: fixed→variable fees, +10 regional airports, mandated Brasilia capex, Dec-2026 tender for 100% of shares). G3 FAILS — no concession-fee, investment, or compensation figures disclosed.
verified.edge: M — TAA signing is public and stock barely moved (+1.2%, $25.84, mid 52wk range, near 50/200d avgs), so the structural reset is partly digested; but the value-determining event (Dec-2026 tender — CAAP bids to take Inframerica to 100%, or no-bid auto-grant) is unresolved and the economics are undisclosed, leaving asymmetric optionality unpriced. Binary/uncertain outcome and missing figures cap conviction.
verified.primary_source: Business Wire / CAAP 6-K press release "Corporación América Airports Announces Developments in the Brasilia Airport Concession Agreement," 2026-06-26 (confirmed via FMP press-releases + StockTitan).
verified.analysis: Real, specific, dated forward special situation: Inframerica executed the TAA with ANAC on Jun 26, 2026 (court-approved Apr 2026), restructuring the Brasilia concession and forcing a fast-track tender for 100% of Inframerica shares by December 2026, in which CAAP intends to participate. This is a genuine structural/regulatory milestone (clears Bloom G1+G2) but G3 fails — no fee/capex/compensation amounts are disclosed, so the specific unpriced figure is absent and the equity-control outcome is genuinely binary (win/lose/no-bid). WATCH not ACTIVE: forward and unfired, but the qualitative economics plus uncertain tender result limit edge; key date to watch is the December 2026 tender.

verified.catalyst: FDA Cellular/Tissue/Gene Therapies AdCom (Jul 29) then PDUFA decision (Aug 22, 2026) on deramiocel's resubmitted BLA for Duchenne cardiomyopathy, a two-sided regulatory binary after a 2025 CRL was lifted.
verified.dated_milestone: FDA CTGTAC advisory committee meeting 2026-07-29 (next dated event); PDUFA action date 2026-08-22
verified.instrument: equity (CAPR); event-driven, options-friendly given binary IV crush/expansion
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: FDA CTGTAC) + G2 (concrete commitment: AdCom convened + PDUFA action date set)
verified.edge: M — dated/forward/unfired with real asymmetry (~$1.1B cap, 52wk $4.30-$40.37, HOPE-3 hit primary PUL v2.0 + LVEF), but it's a well-telegraphed binary and the AdCom itself is two-sided risk (a CRL-history name getting an AdCom signals lingering FDA reservations), so high-variance event not a clean mispricing.
verified.primary_source: Capricor press release / GlobeNewswire / SEC 8-K, 2026-06-26 (AdCom Jul 29, PDUFA Aug 22); FMP quote 2026-06-29 ($24.14, mktcap ~$1.10B)
verified.kill_fact: Primary sources confirm the binary: CTGTAC advisory committee Jul 29 2026 + PDUFA action date Aug 22 2026 for deramiocel's resubmitted BLA (company PR/8-K 2026-06-26; March 10 2026 PR established the Aug 22 date as a Class-2 resubmission after the July 2025 CRL, review resumed/lifted March 2026). HOPE-3 hit primary PUL v2.0 + key secondary LVEF + all Type-I-controlled secondaries, with HOPE-2-OLE support. Both events forward/unfired; live quote $24.41 -7.7% (~$1.12B cap) matches the described selloff. CORRECTION: indication is NOT 'Duchenne cardiomyopathy' narrowly — the resubmission/HOPE-3 package now leads with the skeletal-muscle functional primary (PUL v2.0) and Capricor is pursuing a broader DMD/skeletal-muscle label; cardiomyopathy was the original framing. Genuine high-variance two-sided event, not an under-priced mispricing; edge Medium, conviction caps at 7.
verified.analysis: Capricor confirmed (PR/8-K, 2026-06-26) an FDA CTGTAC advisory committee on Jul 29 2026 and a PDUFA action date of Aug 22 2026 for deramiocel's BLA in DMD cardiomyopathy, with HOPE-3 having hit its primary (PUL v2.0), key cardiac secondary (LVEF) and all Type-I-controlled secondaries plus supportive 5-yr HOPE-2-OLE data. This is a genuine dated, forward, unfired binary: the stock sold off ~13% on Jun 26 and another ~9% to $24.14 today (~$1.1B cap), as the market reads the convening of an AdCom for a resubmitted BLA (the original was CRL'd Jul 2025, lifted Mar 2026) as fresh approval risk. Real and specific, but it is a high-variance two-sided event rather than an under-priced mispricing, so edge is Medium and conviction caps at 7.

verified.catalyst: Biglari's 8th proxy contest (a withhold/vote-against campaign, NOT a slate nomination) was already resolved at the Nov 20, 2025 annual meeting where Biglari lost — no forward-dated trigger remains.
verified.dated_milestone: Annual meeting already held Nov 20, 2025 (RESOLVED against Biglari); no scheduled 2026 meeting or new nomination on file. Next FY26 annual meeting not yet dated (likely Nov 2026).
verified.edge: L — event already fired and lost; stock already re-rated (~$52.5 vs 200d ~$33, near 52w high $71.9 off $24.9 low), so rebrand-reversal/turnaround optimism is priced, not unpriced.
verified.primary_source: Cracker Barrel 8-K / PRNewswire "Cracker Barrel Shareholders Show Strong Support..." (Nov 20-21, 2025) + DFAN14A filings (Nov 2025)
verified.analysis: The triage premise fails verification: the "8th proxy fight" concluded at the Nov 20, 2025 annual meeting where shareholders re-elected 9 of 10 company nominees and rejected Biglari (DFAN14A/8-K, Nov 2025), and in this cycle Biglari did not even nominate his own candidates — he ran a vote-against/withhold campaign, so there was no board seat at stake. The "board nominee filed Jan 2026" detail is a hallucinated conflation with Biglari's 2020 Raymond Barbrick nomination; no new post-Nov-2025 nomination or dated 2026 meeting exists in filings. With the catalyst fired/lost and the stock already up ~110% off its 52-week low into the rebrand-reversal turnaround, there is no real dated forward unpriced trigger — tier NONE.

verified.catalyst: Definitive all-cash acquisition by Knox Lane at $13.25/share ($437M), with the special shareholder vote scheduled and close expected Q3 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: Special shareholder meeting vote on 2026-07-16; close expected Q3 2026.
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Knox Lane) + G2 (concrete definitive merger agreement at $13.25/sh); fails G3 (no specific currently-unpriced figure — spread already ~0.26%)
verified.edge: L — definitive deal is real and dated, but HSR antitrust already cleared (June 23 2026), board recommends, vote is a formality; at $13.215 vs $13.25 the gross spread is ~$0.035 (~0.26%), annualizing to low-single-digit to a Q3 close. Asymmetry is fully priced; only residual is the tail break-risk.
verified.primary_source: Investing.com SEC-filing update, 2026-06-23 (HSR period expired); Businesswire deal announcement, 2026-05-06
verified.analysis: CCRN is a live, definitive merger-arb: Knox Lane acquiring at $13.25/share all-cash, signed May 6 2026, with the major regulatory gate (HSR antitrust) already cleared June 23 2026 and a shareholder vote set for July 16 2026. The catalyst is genuine, dated and forward (deal not yet closed), satisfying G1/G2, but the spread is essentially gone at ~0.26% gross with no unpriced figure (fails G3) — this is a fully re-rated, thin-asymmetry situation. Verdict: real but fully priced; WATCH only for a tail-driven spread widening, score capped low given negligible remaining edge.

verified.catalyst: FDA PDUFA decision on gedatolisib (HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA wild-type advanced breast cancer) — a dated, forward, binary approval event ~18 days out.
verified.dated_milestone: PDUFA goal date July 17, 2026 (Priority Review; NDA accepted Jan 20, 2026)
verified.edge: M — real dated binary approval still forward/unfired, but the supporting VIKTORIA-1 PFS data (WT cohort JCO Mar 2026; mutant cohort Jun 2, 2026) is already public and the stock re-rated from sub-$40 to ~$117 with analyst targets raised to $150-189; approval is high-probability post-clean-Priority-Review, compressing upside while leaving CRL/label-restriction downside.
verified.primary_source: Celcuity IR / StockTitan: NDA Priority Review, PDUFA July 17, 2026 (confirmed via Q4/FY2025 corporate update, Mar 25, 2026); VIKTORIA-2 expansion PR May 14, 2026; VIKTORIA-1 mutant cohort PR Jun 2, 2026.
verified.kill_fact: PDUFA July 17, 2026 confirmed (FDA accepted NDA Jan 20, 2026, Priority Review) for gedatolisib in HR+/HER2-/PIK3CA wild-type advanced breast cancer; forward/dated/binary, not fired. VIKTORIA-1 PIK3CA WT win is real and primary (triplet HR=0.24, mPFS 9.3 vs 2.0 mo p<0.0001; doublet HR=0.33) — but already public and re-rated (stock ATH $144.98 on 2026-05-04, ~$88-98 in June, ~$4.8B cap), so the de-risking event is largely priced and remaining edge is a high-probability approval with asymmetric tail risk = Medium. CORRECTION: VIKTORIA-2 is ~638 + ~440 (~1,078 across two studies), NOT 1,180; it is enrolling, multi-year readout, real but non-near-term optionality.
verified.analysis: The July 17, 2026 PDUFA is a genuine dated, forward, binary regulatory catalyst (Priority Review on a statistically significant Phase 3 PFS win), not a macro bet and not yet fired — it clears the gate as G3. However, the clinical de-risking event (VIKTORIA-1 PFS) is already out and largely re-rated, so the remaining event is a high-probability approval with asymmetric tail risk rather than a pre-data setup; the broader, larger first-line market via VIKTORIA-2 (enrolling, ~1,180 patients) is real optionality but a multi-year readout, not near-term. Net: ACTIVE but Medium edge given how much the tape has already moved.

verified.catalyst: CEPT (Cantor Equity Partners II) shareholders vote today on the de-SPAC merger with tokenization firm Securitize, which will relist as Securitize Corp. on NYSE under SECZ.
verified.dated_milestone: Special shareholder meeting / merger vote scheduled June 29, 2026 (today); closing immediately thereafter, NYSE SECZ relisting to follow.
verified.instrument: common equity (CEPT, NASDAQ; converts to SECZ on NYSE at close)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Securitize) and G2 (concrete commitment: definitive merger agreement, $225M PIPE at $10.00, S-4 declared effective, dated vote) are met; G3 fails — no specific currently-unpriced figure remains, the RWA premium is already in the tape.
verified.edge: L — the catalyst is firing today and the stock has already re-rated above the trust floor, so the asymmetry is consumed.
verified.primary_source: SEC Form 425 (Securitize/CEPT) + StockTitan "S-4 declared effective" (June 5, 2026); special meeting dated June 29, 2026; FMP quote $11.81 (2026-06-29).
verified.analysis: Real, specific, dated de-SPAC (S-4 declared effective June 5, 2026; vote dated June 29, 2026; combined company relists on NYSE as Securitize Corp./SECZ), with Board unanimously recommending FOR and a $225M PIPE at $10.00 — so it clears Bloom G1/G2. But it fails the FORWARD/unpriced test: CEPT trades $11.81 (+8.7% today, ~18% above the $10 trust/PIPE floor), meaning the market has already priced the Securitize RWA-tokenization premium and the catalyst is effectively firing now rather than ahead. Downside is no longer floor-protected at the current price (a deal break reverts to ~$10, an ~18% loss), so the trust-value-floor thesis is gone and the asymmetry is largely set — WATCH-flag is over-generous; this is NONE.

verified.catalyst: Multiple dated 2026 clinical readouts for CD19 T-cell-engager CLN-978 in SLE/RA plus zipalertinib NSCLC PDUFA, but the nearest named readout (EULAR) already fired and the marquee approval is ~8 months out.
verified.dated_milestone: CLN-978 multi-dose RA data Q3 2026 (no fixed date); velinotamig/CLN-049 updates by Q4 2026; zipalertinib ex20ins NSCLC PDUFA Feb 27, 2027
verified.bloom_gates: none clean — no G1 named counterparty, no G2 concrete commitment, no G3 specific currently-unpriced figure; PDUFA is a real dated binary but too far/diffuse
verified.edge: L — stock at $18.26 near 52-wk high ($19.43), ~3x off $5.68 low, mkt cap ~$1.12B vs ~$393M cash; the autoimmune TCE optionality is already substantially priced (EULAR print June 6 fell 6.38% despite 82% SLE B-cell depletion + DORIS remissions), so asymmetry is not clearly mispriced
verified.primary_source: Cullinan EULAR 2026 CLN-978 data release / StockTitan (June 6, 2026); Q1 2026 corporate update GlobeNewswire (May 7, 2026); FMP quote (June 2026)
verified.analysis: CGEM's catalysts are real and dated but the binary asymmetry is not clearly mispriced: the named near-term EULAR CLN-978 SLE/RA readout already fired June 6, 2026 and the stock FELL 6.38% on strong data, signaling the platform is largely in the price after a ~3x run to near 52-week highs. The remaining forward catalysts — CLN-978 multi-dose RA (Q3 2026, undated), velinotamig/CLN-049 (Q4 2026), and the marquee zipalertinib NSCLC PDUFA (Feb 27, 2027) — are genuine but the key approval is ~8 months out and no Bloom gate is cleanly met (no named counterparty, no concrete commitment, no specific unpriced figure). Confirms triage: WATCH with low edge; revisit if a multi-dose RA date is set or the stock derates toward cash (~$6.40/sh).

verified.catalyst: Cretostimogene has two dated regulatory/clinical binaries: PIVOT-006 Phase 3 topline in intermediate-risk NMIBC (guided 1H'26) and completion of the rolling BLA in HR BCG-unresponsive NMIBC (CIS +/- Ta/T1) expected 4Q'26.
verified.dated_milestone: PIVOT-006 Phase 3 topline guided 1H'26 (deadline edge as of 2026-06-29, not yet reported); BLA completion 4Q'26 (CMC is final module, non-clinical/clinical complete).
verified.edge: M — real dated binaries (PIVOT-006 topline + 4Q'26 BLA), but stock has re-rated hard ($71.73 vs 200-day $52.80, near 52wk high $75.50) so much of the optimism is in the tape; PIVOT-006 also sits at the very edge of its H1'26 window so timing/pricing risk is high.
verified.primary_source: CG Oncology Q1 2026 results, GlobeNewswire 2026-05-08 (BLA 4Q'26, PIVOT-006 topline 1H'26, $1.1B cash); PIVOT-006 expedited-timeline PR 2026-01-09.
verified.analysis: CGON's catalysts verify as real, specific, and dated: PIVOT-006 Phase 3 IR-NMIBC topline was expedited to 1H'26 and per the Q1'26 release (5/8/26) had not yet read out, while the rolling BLA in HR BCG-unresponsive NMIBC is guided to complete 4Q'26 with only the CMC module remaining — both forward, neither fired. Risk to the thesis is that the stock has already re-rated substantially (price $71.73 vs 200-day SMA $52.80, near the $75.50 52-week high) and PIVOT-006 sits at the deadline edge of H1'26, so the cleaner unfired dated milestone is the 4Q'26 BLA. Cash is a non-issue ($1.1B at 3/31/26, runway through 2029), removing financing overhang; rates a WATCH/6 — genuine dated forward catalysts but compressed edge given the run.
